search.metaDescription: Find AMM pools, reserves, liquidity activity, contributors, auction slots and fee votes.
search.heading: AMM explorer
search.intro: Search for an automated market maker pool by AMM ID, AMM account, LP token, or asset pair.
search.placeholderLong: Search by AMM ID, account, LP token, issuer, currency, or pair

common.chartDataUnavailable: Chart data is not available yet

tooltips.comparedPreviousClosedDayAccounts: Compared with previous closed day accounts
tooltips.comparedPreviousClosedDayVolume: Compared with previous closed day volume

charts.subtitle: Daily swaps, reserves, deposit / withdrawal activity and LP contributors.

activity.title: Activity
activity.emptyDex: No AMM DEX trades available for the last 24 hours
activity.emptyLiquidity: No AMM {{type}} activity available for the last 24 hours

contributors.title: LP contributors
contributors.subtitle: Top 100 pool share holders.
contributors.unavailable: LP contributors are not available yet

details.title: Ledger details and historical lookup
details.subtitle: AMM account, creation transaction and historical pool state.
details.historicalHint: Loads a separate snapshot below without changing the live pool data above.

historical.snapshotFallback: Snapshot reserves, fee and LP balance.
historical.auctionStateAtSelectedTime: Auction slot state at selected time.
historical.noVoteSlotsSnapshot: No vote slots in this snapshot.
historical.noAuctionSlotSnapshot: No auction slot in this snapshot.

auction.activeDescription: Outbid the active slot to trade at the discounted fee.
auction.openDescription: Claim a fresh discounted fee slot for up to 24 hours.
auction.bidWithLpHint: Use this path if you already hold LP tokens.
auction.checkingLpBalanceHint: We are checking whether the connected wallet has enough LP to bid.
auction.notEnoughLpHint: Get the missing LP first, then place the auction bid.
auction.enoughLpHint: Your connected wallet has enough LP for the max spend cap.
auction.winningBidSpentText: Paid LP tokens buy the discount slot and are not returned when the 24h window expires. Unused room between bid and max is not paid.
auction.addAccountsHint: Add up to 4 accounts if others should trade with the discount too.
auction.signingAccountNote: The signing account gets the discount automatically. If another bid replaces yours before expiry, any refund is protocol-calculated from remaining slot time.
auction.mintLpThenBidHint: Use this path if you need to get LP tokens first.
auction.getMissingLpHint: Mint only the LP amount missing for the max bid cap.
auction.mintLpNote: Mints enough LP for the max spend cap. The follow-up bid spends LP tokens; only LP not spent by the bid stays in your wallet.
auction.mintMissingLpNote: Mints the missing LP only. After it confirms, you can bid from this wallet.
auction.breakEvenHint: Swap volume needed for fee savings to offset the bid.
auction.winningBidPaid: The winning LP bid is paid for the discount slot.
auction.discountEnds: The discount lasts up to 24 hours and can end sooner if outbid.
auction.singleAssetCap: Single-asset options use a maximum cap; the final deposit can be lower.
auction.lpBalanceShortfall: You are missing {{amount}} to bid from this wallet.
auction.bidderAlreadyDiscounted: The bidder account already gets the discount and cannot be added as an authorized account.
auction.yourSlotDescription: This wallet already has the active discounted fee slot.
auction.yourAuthorizedSlot: This wallet is authorized for the discount
auction.yourDiscountHint: You already trade with this slot's discounted fee until it expires or another bid replaces it.

errors.noAmmData: No information found for that AMM ID.
errors.noHistoricalData: No information found for that AMM ID at this time of that day.

deposit.singleAssetLimitNote: Includes a 0.5% buffer. The transaction can spend less, but not more.
deposit.priceLimitNote: Suggested from the current pool and includes a 0.5% buffer.

singleAsset.label: Single asset
singleAsset.description: Deposit one asset and receive a pool share.

twoAsset.label: Two assets
twoAsset.description: Deposit both assets in one transaction.

exactLp.label: Exact LP tokens
exactLp.description: Deposit enough of both assets to receive this LP amount.

singleAssetForLp.label: Single asset for LP
singleAssetForLp.description: Deposit one asset and request a specific LP token amount.

singleAssetWithLimit.label: Single asset with limit
singleAssetWithLimit.description: Deposit one asset with an effective price limit.

withdraw.lpTokensToRedeemUpTo: LP tokens to redeem, up to
withdraw.assetAmountToReceiveUpTo: Asset amount to receive, up to {{asset}}
withdraw.lpAssetCapsNote: The LP amount caps what you redeem; the asset amount caps what you receive. Suggested asset amount includes a 0.5% buffer.
withdraw.priceLimitNote: Suggested from the current pool and includes a 0.5% buffer.

twoAsset.label: Two assets
twoAsset.description: Withdraw both assets in one transaction.

singleAsset.label: Single asset
singleAsset.description: Withdraw one asset from the pool.

redeemLp.label: Redeem LP tokens
redeemLp.description: Redeem LP tokens for both pool assets.

singleAssetForLp.label: Single asset for LP
singleAssetForLp.description: Redeem LP tokens for one asset with both LP and asset caps.

allLpIntoOneAsset.label: All LP into one asset
allLpIntoOneAsset.description: Withdraw all your LP position as one asset with a minimum amount.

singleAssetWithLimit.label: Single asset with limit
singleAssetWithLimit.description: Withdraw one asset with an effective price limit.

withdrawAll.label: Withdraw all
withdrawAll.description: Withdraw your full LP position into both assets.

voteFee.confirmText: Confirm the AMM trading fee before signing. The value is stored on ledger as an AMM vote.
voteFee.invalidFee: Trading fee should be a number from 0 to 1%.
